zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume de Vernon Seigneur de Vernon於1030年出生在法國諾門迪艾弗農時，他的父親Hugh de Vernon Count of Meulan30歲，母親Emma Basset de Centreville24歲。他和Emma FitzOsbern至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1089年在英國英格蘭多瑟特莫斯特頓享年59歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪艾弗農。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume de Vernon Seigneur de Vernon于1030年出生在法国諾門迪艾弗農时，他的父亲Hugh de Vernon Count of Meulan30岁，母亲Emma Basset de Centreville24岁。他和Emma FitzOsbern至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1089年在英国英格兰多瑟特莫斯特頓享年59岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪艾弗農。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vernon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Vernon in Eure, France, named from the Gaulish element ver(n) ‘alder’ + the Gallo-Roman locative suffix -o (genitive -ōnis).
French: habitational name from the same place as in 1 above or from any of several other places in France with the same name and etymology.

variants.name: Varnon
meanings: English (Leicestershire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Vernon  .

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume de Vernon Seigneur de Vernon was born in 1030, in Vernon, Eure, Normandy, France, his father, Hugh de Vernon Count of Meulan, was 30 and his mother, Emma Basset de Centreville, was 24. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Emma FitzOsbern. He died in 1089, in Mosterton, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Vernon, Eure, Normandy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume de Vernon Seigneur de Vernon est né en 1030, à Vernon, Eure, Normandie, France, son père, Hugh de Vernon Count of Meulan, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Emma Basset de Centreville, avait 24 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Emma FitzOsbern. Il est décédé en 1089, à Mosterton, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterré à Vernon, Eure, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume de Vernon Seigneur de Vernon 1030 in Vernon, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Vernon Count of Meulan 30 und seine Mutter Emma Basset de Centreville 24. Er hatte mit Emma FitzOsbern mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1089 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Mosterton, Dorset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Vernon, Eure, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Vernon Seigneur de Vernon è nato il nel 1030 nel Vernon, Eure, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Hugh de Vernon Count of Meulan, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Emma Basset de Centreville, aveva 24 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Emma FitzOsbern. Morì nel 1089, nel Mosterton, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolto a Vernon, Eure, Normandie, Francia.

ja.Vernon, Departement de l'Eure, Haute-Nor: フランスノーマンディエウアバーノン
ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Vernon Seigneur de Vernonが1030年にフランスノーマンディエウアバーノンで生まれた時，父Hugh de Vernon Count of Meulanは30歳，母Emma Basset de Centrevilleは24歳であった。彼はEmma FitzOsbernとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1089年にイギリスイギリスドールセトモステルトンで59歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディエウアバーノンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume de Vernon Seigneur de Vernon(이)가 1030년 프랑스 노먼디 우르 베른넌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Vernon Count of Meulan(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma Basset de Centreville(은)는 24세였다. 그는 Emma FitzOsbern(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1089년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 모스터턴에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 우르 베른넌에 묻혔다.

mn.Mosterton, Dorset, England: Mosterton, Dorseteschyre, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume de Vernon Seigneur de Vernon nasceu em 1030, em Vernon, Eure, Normandie, França, seu pai, Hugh de Vernon Count of Meulan, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Emma Basset de Centreville, tinha 24 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Emma FitzOsbern. Ele faleceu em 1089, em Mosterton, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultado em Vernon, Eure, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume de Vernon Seigneur de Vernon родился в 1030 г. в местности вирнон, эур, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugh de Vernon Count of Meulan было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma Basset de Centreville, 24. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Emma FitzOsbern. Он умер в 1089 г. в местности мустиртон, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и был похоронен в местности вирнон, эур, норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume de Vernon Seigneur de Vernon nació en 1030, en Vernon, Eure, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Hugh de Vernon Count of Meulan, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Emma Basset de Centreville, tenía 24 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Emma FitzOsbern. Murió en 1089, en Mosterton, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultado en Vernon, Eure, Normandie, Francia.
